retrieved_result: Microchips now in production 27/05/2002 At the beginning of March this year, the first microchip was dispatched from Grundfos's sensor department in Farum to the electronics factory in Bjerringbro, where it was integrated in a pressure sensor. This was the start of the actual production of microchips – after approximately eighteen
Decision_Reason: The page discusses microchips production and sensors, not software development IDEs, so it is not relevant to the query.
